description_long: This object is a stylized doll with an elongated, angular form and a glossy, dark red and black color scheme. The body is slender and tapers dramatically at the limbs, giving it a modern, abstract appearance. The head is small and features minimal facial detail, while the arms and legs are sharply pointed and appear fused or closely aligned. The surface is highly reflective, suggesting a hard, plastic or resin material. The overall design is more artistic than realistic, with exaggerated proportions and a striking, almost sculptural silhouette. This doll would stand out as a decorative or collectible item in an urban environment.
description: A glossy, abstract doll with elongated limbs and a dark red-black color scheme, featuring a highly stylized, angular form.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply pointed, elongated limbs and the narrow, V-shaped upper body.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile and the dramatic tapering of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlights the small head and the close alignment of the limbs.
description_view_3: Rear view displays the back of the head and the continuation of the angular, glossy limbs.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the doll's body is a continuous, stylized form with no separate garments or textile patterns.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms and legs elongated and closely aligned, creating a narrow, V-shaped silhouette. The head is upright and centered above the torso.
attribute_facial_expression: Facial features are minimal or abstract, with no discernible expression.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and featureless.
